rows.requirement: Sensitive data such as payment credentials or PII MUST be handled according to PCI-DSS and GDPR guidelines
rows.quote: Sensitive data (such as Payment Credentials or PII) **MUST** be handled ... according to PCI-DSS and GDPR guidelines.
rows.notes: Subject: both parties (Data Privacy). Compliance obligation, not server-observable -> manual. Matches the 2026-04-08 register's PAY-030 (overview.md#L1682); the 2026-01-23 register rows only card-credential PCI (PAY-014), not the general PII/GDPR data-privacy statement. [added by completeness-2026-07-03]
